per_question.answer: The 2021 IPL season was played outside India for the first time, held in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) and Oman, but primarily in the UAE. Chennai Super Kings won that season.

per_question.question: Rohit Sharma debuted in IPL for which franchise before moving to Mumbai Indians, and how many IPL titles has he won with MI?
per_question.ground_truth: Rohit Sharma made his IPL debut for Deccan Chargers (2008–2010) before moving to Mumbai Indians in 2011. He has won five IPL titles with Mumbai Indians (2013, 2015, 2017, 2019, 2020).
per_question.answer: Rohit Sharma debuted in IPL for the Deccan Chargers. He has won 5 IPL titles with the Mumbai Indians.

per_question.question: Which team did CSK and RR replace during their two-year suspension from the IPL (2016–2017), and who won the IPL in those two years?
per_question.ground_truth: When CSK and Rajasthan Royals were suspended for 2 years (2016–2017) due to the betting scandal, they were replaced by Rising Pune Supergiant and Gujarat Lions. Sunrisers Hyderabad won IPL 2016, and Mumbai Indians won IPL 2017.
per_question.answer:
The teams that replaced CSK and RR during their two-year suspension from the IPL (2016–2017) were Gujarat Lions and Rising Pune Supergiant. 

The IPL winners for those two years were:

- 2017: Mumbai Indians

per_question.question: Which player won both the Man of the Tournament award and the Orange Cap in IPL 2016?
per_question.ground_truth: Virat Kohli won both the Man of the Tournament award and the Orange Cap in IPL 2016. He scored 973 runs that season — the highest in a single IPL season — at an average of over 81, including 4 centuries and 7 fifties.
per_question.answer: Virat Kohli.
